title: Wynnrot
description: Wynncraft QoL mods? Never heard of them, it's time for some stupid changes
body: # Wynnrot Wynncraft QoL mods? Never heard of them, it's time for some stupid changes ## Current Features - 67 Fruma Queen - Replaces the Queen portrait with the 67 variant - Eternal Hunger Sui - Replaces all of Sui's portraits with the eating portraits - Meow - Plays a random Minecraft cat sound when a chat message contains the word "meow" - Le Big Fishe - Replaces the "The Piranha" title in Galleon's Graveyard with "Le Big Fishe" and the same for the Corrupted version - Rainbow Text - Render the custom Wynncraft HUD or all text with the rainbow colour - Horse Death - Plays the horse death sound when you die. Gets progressively louder everytime you die in the current session ## Future Features - More dumb stuff - Feel free to suggest anything by opening an issue ## Dependencies - [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) (Required) - [ModMenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) (Optional)
